name: trinity-control-refresh
description: Clean refresh of Trinity Baptist Church production control application
author: Tim Balkwill

scripts.check: node --check electron-main.cjs && node --check preload.cjs && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/remote-client.js && node --check src/server/local-network-server.cjs && node --check src/core/event-bus.cjs && node --check src/core/state-store.cjs && node --check src/core/production-engine.cjs && node --check src/adapters/contracts.cjs && node --check src/adapters/simulation/simulation-camera-controller.cjs && node --check src/adapters/simulation/simulation-switcher-controller.cjs && node --check src/adapters/simulation/simulation-lighting-controller.cjs
